selections.name: Southern Sunshine
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 on a track with a strong on-pace bias. Showed improvement last start and gets a great run in transit.

selections.name: Spicy Apple
selections.reason: Patrick Payne trained runner who has been working up to a win. Forgive the last start; capable of bouncing back here.

selections.name: Vivid Blooms
selections.reason: Drawn well in gate 3 and gets Will Gordon aboard. Has been running fairly and can feature in the finish.

selections.name: Parrot Club
selections.reason: Placed last start and draws an inside gate which is highly advantageous given the track profile.

danger_horse.name: Royal Gala (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: First starter by Raise The Flag with Steven Pateman riding. Has had plenty of trials and could show up on debut.

selections.name: Sirius Black (FR)
selections.reason: Class runner of the field with excellent consistent form. Highweight specialist who will appreciate the conditions.

selections.name: Whisky Moon
selections.reason: Drawn beautifully in barrier 2. Solid recent form including a win two starts back. Major threat.

selections.name: Sunday Buzz (NZ)
selections.reason: Symon Wilde trained and has a good overall record. Will be fitter second-up and draws well.

selections.name: In Your Hands (NZ)
selections.reason: Andrea Leek trained runner who has been racing consistently. Can sit handy from the draw.

danger_horse.name: Zoom (GB)
danger_horse.reason: Resuming but has won first-up previously. Capable of a bold showing fresh.

selections.name: Zephyr Song
selections.reason: Qualifies for the Unexposed Elite bonus. Waterhouse/Bott trained, drawn the rail on an on-pace track, and was a strong 2nd last start.

selections.name: Aradeo
selections.reason: Hayes trained filly who was a very good 2nd last start. Draws well and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Chasing Rainbows
selections.reason: Matt Laurie trained and ran a solid 2nd on debut. Improvement expected second-up.

selections.name: Lady In Red
selections.reason: Drawn well in barrier 2. Should get a soft run and can sneak into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Race For Rule
danger_horse.reason: First starter from the Griffiths yard. Watch the market for any positive moves.

selections.name: Batoka Chief (NZ)
selections.reason: Top weight dropping in class. Has been racing in tougher company and should find this much easier.

selections.name: Ryanman
selections.reason: Consistent type who is rarely far away. Will be competitive again in this grade.

selections.name: All In Vain
selections.reason: Fitter third-up. Has shown glimpses of ability and can figure if he puts it all together.

selections.name: Red Stiletto
selections.reason: Veteran mare who gets the inside draw. Can use the rail to her advantage to save ground.

selections.name: Super Choice
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott trained, drawn perfectly in barrier 3. Put in a solid run last start and gets the Unexposed Elite bonus.

selections.name: Privateer
selections.reason: Price/Kent trained filly who was a narrow 2nd last start. Progressing well and is a major threat.

selections.name: Kentucky Hustle
selections.reason: First starter for Kennewell drawn the pole. Has had plenty of trials and the rail is a huge advantage here.

selections.name: Warrego
selections.reason: Maher trained runner who should progress from his first-up run. Respect the stable.

danger_horse.name: Pee Plater
danger_horse.reason: First starter by Shamus Award. Runner-up in a recent jump-out and could surprise.

selections.name: Brullen
selections.reason: Extremely consistent (10 placings). Gets the absolute perfect draw in barrier 1 on a tight track with on-pace bias. Ready to win.

selections.name: Zoulette
selections.reason: Maher trained filly resuming. Won her maiden at this track and distance before a spell. Classy.

selections.name: Excenia
selections.reason: McEvoy trained filly returning from a break. Has placed fresh previously and has ability.

selections.name: Unobscured
selections.reason: Draws well in barrier 4. Has been racing fairly and can sneak into the placings from a good spot.

danger_horse.name: Miss Himalaya
danger_horse.reason: Emergency who gets in light and draws perfectly in barrier 2. Can run a cheeky race if she gains a start.

selections.name: Miss Trustful
selections.reason: Maher trained mare who gets the ultimate gear change with barrier 1. Will save all the ground and is ready to peak.

selections.name: Wild Sensation
selections.reason: Racing very consistently with a good 2nd last start. Will be prominent and fighting out the finish.

selections.name: License To Excite
selections.reason: Coming off a win last start and draws well in barrier 4. Confidence is high and can go on with it.

selections.name: Castlefield Flyer
selections.reason: Solid 2nd last start but has to overcome a very wide draw on a tight track. Talent is there if she gets luck.

danger_horse.name: Pick Wisely
danger_horse.reason: Has shown ability in the past and gets a jockey upgrade to Jett Stanley. Can improve sharply.
